'''Venaari''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] world, and the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Vellakiya system]]. It was the headquarters of [[Venaari Enterprises]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] increased its presence on the planet following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] due to [[Project Orrad]], which was exposed by [[Shandria L'hnnar]]. The heightened [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] security made it difficult for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] to gain a foothold on Venaari.

The [[Local day/Legends|local day]] lasted 28 [[Standard hour/Legends|standard hours]]; the [[local year]] lasted 300 local [[Standard day/Legends|days]].
